TestCase z74Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_observed = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_observed, t1.observed, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.observed = follow_case_observed;
    // ------------------------------------

    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n == 0
    if (follow_case.n <= 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }

    // Specific operation code: replace -Inf elements with -DBL_MAX
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n; ++i) {
        if (follow_case.observed[i] == -1.0/0.0) { // -Inf detection
            follow_case.observed[i] = -1.7976931348623157e+308; // -DBL_MAX
        }
    }

    return follow_case;
}
